summary: Applied two surgical seam-polish edits to strengthen continuity with adjacent chapters: echoed Chapter 8's watch/microwave synchronization in the opening beat, and added a pre-dawn intake-prep beat that sets up Chapter 10's clinic notebook and folder details.
